sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: ISCG Stock Fund Price and Chart — AMEX:ISCG
feed.summary: This article provides a detailed overview of the iShares Morningstar Small-Cap Growth ETF (ISCG), covering its fund price, chart, key financial statistics like AUM and expense ratio, and a description of its investment strategy. It also includes frequently asked questions about ETFs and ISCG specifically, along with technical analysis summaries.

feed.title: Clarkston boosts Presurance Holdings (PRHI) stake with stock purchases
feed.summary: Clarkston Companies, a 10% owner of Presurance Holdings, Inc. (PRHI), significantly increased its stake through recent stock purchases. On February 27, 2026, Clarkston acquired 9,065,360 shares of common stock at $1.00 per share, while also having 1,500 shares of Series B preferred stock redeemed by Presurance. Earlier, on December 23, 2025, Clarkston had purchased 1,600 shares of Series C preferred stock for $5,000 per share.

feed.title: Haverty Furniture Companies (NYSE:HVT.A) Dividend Yield, History and Growth
feed.summary: Haverty Furniture Companies (NYSE:HVT.A) currently offers a dividend yield of 5.66% and a total shareholder yield of 7.5%, including a 1.8% buyback yield. The company's dividend payments have been volatile but have increased over the past decade. While its payout ratio (106%) suggests dividends are not well covered by earnings, they are covered by cash flows (64.6%).

feed.title: HRTS Stock Fund Price and Chart — NASDAQ:HRTS
feed.summary: The HRTS Tema Heart & Health ETF focuses on long-term capital growth by investing in companies combating diabetes, obesity, and cardiovascular diseases, primarily in the US and Europe. Launched on November 21, 2023, the actively managed fund has an expense ratio of 0.18% and an AUM of $54.69 million. It aims to achieve returns by integrating ESG factors with fundamental and quantitative analysis.

feed.title: Arcellx Inc stock hits all-time high at 114.27 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Arcellx Inc (ACLX) stock has reached an all-time high of $114.27, reflecting an 82% surge over the past year and 75% year-to-date, boosting its market cap to $6.67 billion. This comes despite InvestingPro data suggesting the stock is overvalued and in overbought territory. The company is also in the process of being acquired by Gilead Sciences for $7.8 billion, leading several analyst firms to downgrade Arcellx to "Hold" or "Neutral" with price targets around the acquisition offer of $115 per share.

feed.title: Stellar Bancorp (STEL) SEVP Justin Long granted 7,074 stock and PSU shares
feed.summary: Justin M. Long, SEVP, GC & Secretary of Stellar Bancorp, Inc. (STEL), was granted 7,074 shares of common stock and performance share units on March 1, 2026, at no cash cost. These awards are subject to vesting conditions, including continued employment and performance targets. Following these grants, Mr. Long directly holds 54,111 shares of Stellar Bancorp common stock.

feed.title: Is It Too Late To Reassess Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) After Its Recent Share Price Strength
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) has experienced mixed share price movements, showing gains over three and five years but declines over shorter periods. Valuation analyses suggest the stock is currently overvalued, with both the Excess Returns model and the Price vs. Earnings ratio indicating it trades above its intrinsic value and fair ratio. Investors are encouraged to use narratives for a more comprehensive valuation.

feed.title: Quanta Services Adopts 2026 Performance-Based Incentive Framework
feed.summary: Quanta Services has approved a new performance-based incentive framework for 2026, aligning executive and staff compensation with key financial and operational metrics. The framework includes annual incentives tied to EBITDA, EBITDA margin, and safety, along with long-term incentives based on return on invested capital, earnings per share, and total stockholder return for the 2026–2028 period. This initiative aims to strengthen the company’s pay-for-performance culture and connect employee incentives more closely to profitability, capital efficiency, and shareholder value.

feed.title: News | CoStar World News for March 5
feed.summary: Radisson Hotel Group plans to open up to 50 new co-branded hotels in India over the next decade due to rising tourism demand. The UK Chancellor seeks to protect the national economy from global conflicts, and American investment firm Bain Capital is looking for more real estate opportunities in France after deploying over €1 billion in Europe. TPG Real Estate is set to acquire a large healthcare portfolio in Germany from Northwest Healthcare Properties, while Canadian restaurant owners expect worsening profits due to labor constraints and policy uncertainty, potentially impacting landlords. US banks are showing increased commercial real estate lending growth and a slowdown in delinquencies, signaling positive trends for property markets despite remaining loan stress.

feed.title: Dell Technologies (NYSE: DELL) backer Silver Lake reports Class C share sales
feed.summary: Investment entities associated with Silver Lake, including SL SPV-2, L.P., Silver Lake Partners IV, L.P., and Silver Lake Partners V DE (AIV), L.P., converted Dell Technologies Class B Common Stock into Class C Common Stock on March 2, 2026, and subsequently sold a combined 277,567 Class C shares. The sales occurred at weighted average prices ranging from $146.5375 to $150.5429 per share, but these entities continue to hold significant indirect stakes in Dell. The report also highlights the involvement of Egon Durban, a Co-CEO of Silver Lake Group, L.L.C. and a director of Dell, in connection with these holdings.

feed.title: Chipotle Mexican Grill, Inc. (NYSE:CMG) Short Interest Up 19.6% in February
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill (NYSE:CMG) saw a significant increase in short interest, rising by 19.6% to 36,521,145 shares as of February 13th, representing approximately 2.8% of its shares sold short with a days-to-cover ratio of 1.5 days. Despite this, analyst sentiment remains largely positive, with a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and an average target price of $47.24, following multiple price target increases. Institutional investors, including Vanguard Group Inc. and Capital World Investors, also increased their stakes in the company, which recently beat quarterly earnings and revenue estimates.

feed.title: Cadence (CDNS) director updates insider Form 3 to add 30 shares
feed.summary: Cadence Design Systems director Moshe Gavriellov has filed an amended Form 3 to correct his initial insider ownership report. The amendment adds 30 previously omitted shares of common stock held directly, clarifying his reported holdings. This filing serves only to update disclosure and does not reflect any new buy or sell transactions.

feed.title: Is Vertex Pharmaceuticals (VRTX) Still Attractively Priced After Its Multi Year Share Price Run?
feed.summary: This article analyzes Vertex Pharmaceuticals (VRTX) valuation after its significant share price run. Using a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) model, the analysis suggests VRTX is 45.8% undervalued, while its Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio indicates it is slightly overvalued compared to Simply Wall St's "Fair Ratio." The article also presents "Narratives" for both bull and bear cases, highlighting diverse investor perspectives on the company's future value based on different assumptions regarding growth, risks, and pipeline.

feed.title: TJX Companies - CEO Ernie Herrman reports sale of 30,000 shares of co's common stock at average price of $160.95/share on March 2 - SEC filing
feed.summary: Ernie Herrman, CEO of TJX Companies, reported the sale of 30,000 shares of the company's common stock. The transaction occurred on March 2 at an average price of $160.95 per share, as disclosed in an SEC filing. This insider transaction provides insight into executive stock movements within the company.

feed.title: How Investors Are Reacting To Roper Technologies (ROP) Expanding Campus Commerce Into Stadium Concessions
feed.summary: Roper Technologies (ROP) recently announced an integration between its Transact + CBORD campus commerce platforms and MyVenue, a sports and entertainment POS provider. This expansion allows collegiate students to use campus funds for concessions at stadiums, broadening Roper's software and payments ecosystem into high-traffic event environments. While this move is directionally positive, it's unlikely to be a significant near-term driver for the company, as investors are more focused on potential reacceleration of software earnings and the role of AI in supporting margins and organic growth.

feed.title: MarineMax Authorizes New $100 Million Share Repurchase Program
feed.summary: MarineMax, the world's largest recreational boat and yacht retailer, has authorized a new $100 million share repurchase program extending through March 2028, replacing a previous one. This initiative aims to offset share dilution from restricted stock and support employee benefit plans, signaling the company's confidence in its long-term strategy and active capital management. The stock currently holds a "Hold" rating with a $31.00 price target from analysts, while TipRanks’ AI Analyst, Spark, rates HZO as "Neutral," citing weakened profitability and elevated leverage despite stable revenue.

feed.title: Top Stocks to Double Up on Right Now
feed.summary: Amidst market uncertainties driven by geopolitical concerns, this article recommends two high-yield dividend stocks, Realty Income (NYSE: O) and Federal Realty (NYSE: FRT), as reliable investments. Realty Income, the largest net lease REIT, offers a 4.8% dividend yield and a history of three decades of annual increases. Federal Realty, a Dividend King with over five decades of dividend growth, focuses on high-quality retail properties and provides a 4% dividend yield, both offering stability and passive income for investors.

feed.title: Amgen (AMGN) Maintains Quarterly Dividend of $2.52 Per Share
feed.summary: Amgen (AMGN) announced it will maintain its quarterly dividend of $2.52 per share, resulting in a forward yield of 2.66%. The company is targeting significant revenue growth by 2026, driven by key products and strategic acquisitions. While Amgen shows strong profitability metrics, investors are advised to consider its valuation and certain financial stress indicators like the Altman Z-Score and high debt-to-equity ratio.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley to Cut 3% of Workforce Across All Business Lines
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley is set to reduce its global workforce by approximately 3%, impacting staff across investment banking, trading, wealth management, and asset management. The job cuts, affecting both front and back-office employees, are attributed to individual performance, evolving business priorities, and shifting location strategies. This decision comes as the financial giant streamlines its operations.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Darrell Schuh Sells Shares of A.O. Smith Corp (AOS)
feed.summary: Darrell Schuh, Senior Vice President and President & General Manager of Lochinvar, sold 1,104 shares of A.O. Smith Corp (AOS) on March 4, 2026, reducing his holdings to 2,201 shares. The transaction, part of a pattern of insider selling at the company over the past year, occurred while AOS shares were trading at $74.39. GuruFocus assesses the stock as fairly valued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 0.97.

feed.title: NRG (NYSE: NRG) LS Power secondary stock sale and $300M buyback
feed.summary: NRG Energy is facilitating a secondary public offering of 14.3 million shares of its common stock by LS Power affiliates at $164.00 per share, generating approximately $2.35 billion in gross proceeds for the selling stockholders. Concurrently, NRG will repurchase $300 million of its own shares from the same selling stockholders, utilizing its existing share repurchase program. The company will not receive any proceeds from the secondary offering.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Jeffrey Leitzell Sells Shares of EOG Resources Inc (EOG)
feed.summary: Jeffrey Leitzell, Executive Vice President & Chief Operating Officer of EOG Resources Inc, sold 3,774 shares of the company on March 3, 2026. Following this transaction, he now owns 88,045.492 shares. The stock traded at $128.39 on the day of the sale, and GuruFocus assesses EOG Resources Inc as fairly valued with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 1.05.

feed.title: Edison International (EIX) EVP receives stock options and RSU awards
feed.summary: Jill Charlotte Anderson, Executive Vice President of Southern California Edison, a subsidiary of Edison International (EIX), has been granted 24,938 non-qualified stock options and 4,032 restricted stock units (RSUs). These awards are part of her executive compensation, with the stock options vesting in tranches over three years starting January 2027 and the RSUs being equivalent in value to Edison International common stock. The filing clarifies that these are compensation awards, not open-market transactions.

feed.title: ImmunityBio (NASDAQ:IBRX) Stock Price Down 10.2% - What's Next?
feed.summary: ImmunityBio (NASDAQ:IBRX) shares dropped 10.2% during mid-day trading on Wednesday, closing at $8.98, despite a previous closing price of $10.00 and an impressive market capitalization of $9.23 billion. The stock traded with high volume, seeing 32.8 million shares change hands, while analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target of $13.60, yet insider sales amount to $4.47 million over the past 90 days. The company recently reported an EPS beat at -$0.06 against estimates of -$0.08, with revenues of $38.3 million, but anticipates a full-year EPS of -0.92.

feed.title: Lam Research (NASDAQ:LRCX) Trading 2.6% Higher - Should You Buy?
feed.summary: Lam Research (NASDAQ:LRCX) saw its shares trade 2.6% higher during midday activity, following strong quarterly results that beat analyst estimates and positive guidance. Despite this momentum, the stock faces near-term risks from geopolitical tensions, insider selling, and a relatively high valuation. Analysts have adjusted price targets, with an average "Moderate Buy" rating, suggesting both upside potential and caution.

feed.title: Western Digital (NASDAQ:WDC) Trading Up 4.3% - Time to Buy?
feed.summary: Western Digital (NASDAQ:WDC) shares climbed 4.3% to $261.30 after beating quarterly earnings and revenue expectations. Analysts like Citigroup, TD Cowen, and Wedbush have raised price targets, contributing to a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating and a target of $265.58. The company also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.125, although insiders have recently sold a significant number of shares.

feed.title: Altria Group (NYSE:MO) Trading Down 1.1% - Here's Why
feed.summary: Altria Group (NYSE:MO) saw its shares fall by 1.1% during Wednesday's mid-day trading. The stock performed below expectations, with the company missing quarterly EPS estimates and revenue slightly decreasing, despite announcing a quarterly dividend of $1.06. Analyst ratings are mixed for Altria, with a consensus "Hold" rating and a target price of $64.33, while institutional investors have shown varied activity in adding to or reducing their stakes.

feed.title: Kenvue (NYSE: KVUE) grants CTO 79,407 RSUs vesting 2027-2029
feed.summary: Kenvue Inc. (NYSE: KVUE) reported that its Chief Tech & Data Officer, Michael Wondrasch, received a grant of 79,407 restricted stock units (RSUs). These RSUs, which correspond one-for-one with Kenvue common stock, will vest in three equal installments on March 2, 2027, March 2, 2028, and March 2, 2029, provided he continues his service with the company. This equity award is a form of compensation designed to align his interests with the company's long-term performance.

feed.title: Kenvue (NYSE: KVUE) grants 63,525 RSUs to Chief Scientific Officer
feed.summary: Kenvue Inc. has granted 63,525 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) to its Chief Scientific Officer, Caroline Tillett, as an equity award. These RSUs, which convert one-for-one with Kenvue common stock, were granted at no cash cost and will vest in three equal installments on March 2, 2027, 2028, and 2029, provided Tillett remains with the company. This transaction is considered neutral in sentiment and impact according to the filing summary.

feed.title: Chevron (NYSE: CVX) director reports phantom stock plan transaction
feed.summary: Chevron Corp director Marillyn A. Hewson reported a transaction involving 205 units of phantom stock at $189.60 per unit, issued under the company's Non-Employee Directors' Equity Compensation and Deferral Plan. These phantom stock units become payable in common stock when her board service ends. Following this latest transaction, Hewson holds a total of 5,867 phantom stock units, which includes 61 units from dividend equivalent accruals.

feed.title: Vulcan Materials (VMC) Downgraded by J.P. Morgan Amid Weak Outlook
feed.summary: J.P. Morgan downgraded Vulcan Materials (VMC) from Overweight to Neutral, lowering its price target to $320 due to disappointing Q4 results, weak FY 2026 guidance, and challenges in predicting demand growth, especially in the residential sector. The company's shares dropped 1.3% following the downgrade. High valuation multiples and a multi-year high short interest of 3.6% also contributed to the cautious outlook despite Vulcan's strong financial health and consistent revenue growth.

feed.title: Insider Sell Alert: VON STAATS AARON C Sells Shares of PTC Inc (PTC)
feed.summary: VON STAATS AARON C, Executive Vice President and Chief Legal Officer at PTC Inc, sold 2,639 shares of PTC Inc on March 3, 2026, reducing his holdings to 19,582 shares. This transaction is part of a pattern of insider sales at PTC Inc, with no insider purchases in the past year. Despite the insider selling, PTC Inc shares are considered modestly undervalued based on its GuruFocus Value, trading at $160 with a GF Value of $214.95.

feed.title: Edison International (EIX) awards options and RSUs to SCE president Powell
feed.summary: Edison International (EIX) has granted new equity awards to Steven D. Powell, President and CEO of Southern California Edison, as reported in a recent Form 4 SEC filing. Powell received 56,110 non-qualified stock options, vesting in tranches between 2027 and 2029, and 9,071 restricted stock units, directly linking his compensation to long-term shareholder value. These awards are part of his compensation package and not open-market trades.

feed.title: Edison International (EIX) grants options and RSUs to EVP & General Counsel
feed.summary: Edison International (EIX) has granted new equity awards, including non-qualified stock options and restricted stock units (RSUs), to its Executive Vice President and General Counsel, Chonda J. Nwamu. The awards, granted on March 2, 2026, consist of 36,804 stock options and 5,950 RSUs, both valued at $0.00 per unit, reflecting compensation-based incentives. The stock options will vest in three equal annual installments starting January 4, 2027, aligning long-term incentives with future service.

feed.title: The New England Journal of Medicine Publishes First Data to Demonstrate the Potential for Disease Modification in Dravet Syndrome
feed.summary: Stoke Therapeutics and Biogen announced the publication of data in The New England Journal of Medicine (NEJM) for zorevunersen, an investigational medicine for Dravet syndrome. The data, from Phase 1/2a and ongoing open-label extension studies, show potential for disease modification, with substantial and durable reductions in seizures and improvements in cognition and behavior. The results support the ongoing global Phase 3 EMPEROR study for zorevunersen, which aims to target the underlying genetic cause of Dravet syndrome.

feed.title: BofA Finance sells Enhanced Return Notes (BAC): $1.881M, 5-year, 205.50% upside
feed.summary: BofA Finance LLC has priced $1.881 million in Enhanced Return Notes, fully guaranteed by Bank of America Corporation (BAC), linked to the S&P 500® Futures Excess Return Index. These five-year notes, maturing on March 4, 2031, offer a 205.50% upside participation if the underlying index's Ending Value exceeds its Starting Value. However, investors face a 1:1 downside exposure with potential principal loss if the Ending Value falls below 70% of the Starting Value.

feed.title: American Tower Corp Executive Sells Over $7.8 Million in Company Stock
feed.summary: Noel Eugene M, EVP & Chief Operating Officer of American Tower Corp (AMT), sold 41,209 shares of common stock on March 2, 2026, totaling over $7.8 million. The shares were sold at prices ranging from $189.36 to $192.03 under a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Following this transaction, Noel Eugene M directly holds 29,592 shares in the company.

feed.title: Citigroup (NYSE: C) offers $10M Auto‑Callable notes tied to SPY
feed.summary: Citigroup Global Markets Holdings Inc. is offering $10 million of Contingent Income Auto-Callable Securities linked to the performance of the State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY), due March 5, 2027. These securities offer monthly contingent coupon payments of 1.125% (13.50% per annum) if SPY closes at or above 90% of its initial share price. The notes may be automatically redeemed early if SPY reaches or exceeds its initial share price on a redemption date, but investors face principal-at-risk if not redeemed and the final share price falls below the downside threshold.

feed.title: [424B2] CITIGROUP INC Prospectus Supplement
feed.summary: Citigroup Global Markets Holdings Inc., guaranteed by Citigroup Inc., is offering 7-year callable contingent yield notes linked to the EURO STOXX 50®, Russell 2000®, and S&P 500® indices. These notes offer a 9.25% annual contingent coupon if the least performing underlying meets its coupon barrier, but investors face capital loss if the least performing underlying falls below its downside threshold at maturity and the notes are not called early. Investing involves significant risks including credit risk of Citigroup and potential loss of the entire principal investment.

feed.title: BofA (BAC) launches 12‑month auto‑call notes tied to NDXT, KRE, SMH
feed.summary: BofA Finance LLC, guaranteed by Bank of America Corporation, is offering 12-month Auto-Callable Notes linked to the performance of the Nasdaq-100 Technology Sector Index (NDXT), SPDR S&P Regional Banking ETF (KRE), and VanEck Semiconductor ETF (SMH). These notes are expected to price on March 4, 2026, and issue on March 9, 2026, with automatic monthly call opportunities starting June 4, 2026, if each underlying is at or above 90% of its starting value. If not called, maturity payouts vary, offering a return if the least performing underlying meets certain thresholds, but risking up to 100% principal loss if it falls more than 40%.

feed.title: [424B2] BANK OF AMERICA CORP /DE/ Prospectus Supplement
feed.summary: BofA Finance LLC is offering Contingent Income Auto-Callable Yield Notes linked to the performance of the VanEck Gold Miners ETF (GDX) and the iShares Silver Trust (SLV). These notes, fully guaranteed by Bank of America Corporation (BAC), offer a contingent monthly coupon of 1.0417% (12.50% per annum) if both underlying assets are at or above 55% of their starting values. The notes have an approximate 2.75-year term and are callable monthly starting September 28, 2026, if both underlyings are at or above 100% of their starting values, but carry downside risk of up to 100% loss of principal if not called and the least performing underlying falls more than 45%.

feed.title: Jefferies Reiterates Buy on The Boeing Company (BA) March 04, 2026
feed.summary: Jefferies has reiterated a "Buy" rating on The Boeing Company (BA) on March 4, 2026, without issuing a new price target, indicating sustained analyst confidence in the company's prospects. This decision led to a minimal intraday price change of 0.06% ($0.14) for BA. Meyka AI also assigns Boeing a B grade, considering S&P 500 comparison, sector strength, financial growth, key metrics, and analyst consensus.

feed.title: Auto-call JPMorgan notes linked to MSCI EM (AMJB) with 11.67% call premium
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase Financial Company LLC is offering auto-callable buffered return enhanced notes linked to the MSCI Emerging Markets Index (AMJB). These notes offer a potential 11.67% call premium if the index meets a certain level on the Review Date and 1.25x leveraged participation in positive index returns at maturity, with a 20% downside buffer. The offering involves significant risks, including potential loss of principal, credit risks of JPMorgan, and limited secondary market liquidity.

feed.title: ServiceNow (NOW) Price Forecast: Double Bottom Signals Trend Shift
feed.summary: ServiceNow (NOW) has shown a bullish reversal with a confirmed double bottom breakout above $110.85, supported by a bullish RSI divergence and reclaim of its 20-day moving average. The stock, having corrected 59.1% from its January 2025 peak, now targets an initial upside zone of $135.73–$141.35, with critical support levels at $110.85 and the rising 20-day moving average. Traders are watching for potential continuation setups following the initial pullback after this significant trend shift.

feed.title: Airbnb (ABNB) CFO Elinor Mertz sells 3,750 shares under 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Airbnb's CFO, Elinor Mertz, sold 3,750 shares of Class A common stock at $130.00 per share in an open-market transaction. This sale was conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on May 30, 2025. Following this transaction, Mertz directly holds 402,416.681 shares of the company.

feed.title: Elevance Health (ELV) legal chief receives stock awards, withholds shares for tax
feed.summary: Elevance Health's EVP & Chief Legal Officer, Erin M. Wessling, recently received equity compensation consisting of 2,976 restricted share units and an option for 11,754 shares. To cover tax withholding obligations from previously vested restricted stock, 417 shares were disposed of at $284.03 each. After these transactions, Ms. Wessling directly holds 7,579 common shares of Elevance Health.

feed.title: NextEra Energy and NextEra Energy Partners to meet with investors in early to mid-March
feed.summary: NextEra Energy (NEE) and NextEra Energy Partners (NEP) announced that their senior management teams will hold investor meetings in early to mid-March. They plan to discuss long-term growth rate expectations, reaffirming those presented during their Q4 2023 earnings call on January 25, 2024. Investors can access related news releases and presentation materials on their respective company websites.

feed.title: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) grants 9,944 stock units to executive
feed.summary: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) executive Brendan A. Lawlor was granted 9,944 restricted stock units (RSUs) on March 2, 2026. These units, valued at $0.00 per share, will vest in two equal installments on the third and fourth anniversaries of the grant date. Following this award, Lawlor directly owns 49,816.633 shares of common stock.

feed.title: Huntington Bancshares (HBAN) SVP receives 71,596 RSUs vesting over time
feed.summary: Huntington Bancshares Senior Executive Vice President Brantley J. Standridge was granted 71,596 restricted stock units (RSUs) as part of his equity compensation. These RSUs, which were received at no cash cost, will vest in two equal installments on the third and fourth anniversaries of the grant date. Following this award, Standridge's direct holdings in Huntington Bancshares increased to 382,581.35 shares, as detailed in the SEC Form 4 filing.

feed.title: Huntington Bancshares grants 53,034 units to executive | HBAN SEC Filing - Form 4
feed.summary: Huntington Bancshares Senior Executive Vice President Scott D. Kleinman was granted 53,034 restricted stock units (RSUs) on March 2, 2026, as reported in a Form 4 SEC filing. The RSUs, valued at $0.00 per share, vest in two equal installments on the third and fourth anniversaries of the grant date. Following this transaction, Kleinman directly holds 476,679.246 shares of common stock and indirectly holds 359.076 shares through a company plan.
